♪ tap
the day after 🌅

Still here.
Still choosing you.

the anniversary passed. but this didn't.

Yesterday was about celebrating six months. Today is about something quieter — just me, sitting here, thinking about you the way I always do, and realising the day doesn't matter. The feeling doesn't go away just because the date changed. So I'm writing this down. For you. Because you deserve to hear it on an ordinary day too. 💛

what I don't say enough 🤍

Things you carry
without knowing it.

You don't realise how much you do for me just by being you. Not by doing anything extraordinary. Just by existing in my life the way you do.

☀️
Every morning I know you exist, I wake up differently. There's a quiet certainty about the day when you're in it. You don't know you do that.
🫂
When I'm going through something and I hear your voice, something in me physically settles. You are the only person who can do that.
🌙
On the nights I don't tell you I'm struggling, just knowing I could call you is enough to make it okay. Your presence alone is its own kind of peace.
🔥
You push me. Not loudly. Just by being someone I want to be better for. You make me want to become more.
a letter 💌
🕯️

The day after. On a completely ordinary morning —

My dearest Princess,

The anniversary is over. The date has passed. And nothing has changed. That's the thing I want you to understand — my feelings don't live on a calendar. They just live. Every single day, quietly, consistently, without needing a reason.

I've been thinking about how you reassure me. How every time I doubt myself, you somehow already know what to say. Nobody has ever done that for me the way you do. And I don't think you understand how rare that is. How rare you are.

You make ordinary feel like enough. You make a regular Tuesday feel like something worth remembering. I don't need big moments with you. I just need you in my ordinary ones.

So this isn't an anniversary message. This is just a Tuesday message. A "I thought about you before I even opened my eyes" message. A "I'm glad you're mine" message. No occasion needed. You're the occasion.

Yours, on every ordinary day 💛

be honest 🕯️

"Do you believe me when I say this is real?"

Not the anniversary. Not the words I say when I'm supposed to say them. This. Right now. This ordinary Tuesday love.

Good. Because it is. Every single word. 💛

reasons 🌿

Things about you
I think about daily.

🌅

How you start my day

Just knowing you're going to be in it makes the morning feel different. Lighter.

🗣️

The way you talk

There's something about how you express things. I could listen for hours and still want more.

🫀

How you reassure me

You always find the exact right thing to say. You don't patch me up — you actually heal it.

😂

Your laugh

Real laughs. The ones that sneak out before you can stop them. I collect those moments.

🧠

How you think

Your mind goes places most people's don't. You see things. Notice things. It genuinely amazes me.

🥹

That you don't know

How much you mean to me. And somehow that just makes you mean even more.

🌙

Late night you

Sleepy but still there. That's the version I want to keep forever. Just existing together.

💛

You choose me too

That's still the thing I think about most. You choose me back. That doesn't get old.

honest 🫀

Please don't get
tired of me.

I mean this more than anything else on this page.

I know I'm not perfect. I go quiet sometimes when I should say more. I overthink things. I carry stuff I don't always hand to you properly. Some days I'm a lot and some days I disappear a little. I know that's not always easy.

But I need you to know that everything I am, I'm giving it to you. Not the polished version. The real one. The one that wakes up already thinking about you. The one that saves things to tell you later. The one that feels safest when I hear your voice.

You reassure me so naturally. Like breathing. And I just want you to know that I don't take that for granted. Not for one single day. You matter to me in a way I'm still finding words for.

So please stay. Not because you have to. Because I'm working every day to be worth staying for. 🥹💛

quick game 🎯

How well do you
know this heart?

Five questions. No wrong answers. Okay, there are wrong answers.

Loading...

God's words for us 📖

Written long before
we even existed.

These aren't just verses I picked. These are the ones I read and thought — that's us.

"Two are better than one, because they have a good reward for their toil. For if they fall, one will lift up his fellow."

Ecclesiastes 4:9–10

You've lifted me more times than you know. That's exactly what this verse looks like in real life.

"Love is patient and kind. It does not envy or boast; it is not arrogant or rude. It bears all things, believes all things, hopes all things, endures all things. Love never ends."

1 Corinthians 13:4–8

That last part. Love never ends. I read that and I thought of you immediately.

"Place me like a seal over your heart, like a seal on your arm; for love is as strong as death, its jealousy unyielding as the grave. It burns like blazing fire, like a mighty flame."

Song of Solomon 8:6

That's not a soft, quiet love. That's a love that means something. That's the kind I'm giving you.

"I am my beloved's and my beloved is mine."

Song of Solomon 6:3

Six words. My favourite six words in any language. Because they're just us. Simple and complete.

written down and kept 📝

What I'm
promising you.

Not grand gestures. Just the quiet things. The ones that actually matter.

  • 01I promise to show up for you quietly — not just in the big moments but in the Tuesday evenings and the random bad days you didn't ask for.
  • 02I promise to never make you doubt how I feel. You should never have to wonder. I'll make it clear, again and again, for as long as you need me to.
  • 03I promise to keep choosing you actively. Not out of habit. Because every single day I genuinely, consciously want to.
  • 04I promise to grow for you — to become someone who deserves the way you love me. That's not pressure. That's motivation.
  • 05I promise to protect your peace. To never be the reason your heart is heavy. Your peace matters to me more than being right.
  • 06I promise to say it, not just feel it. You deserve to hear it out loud. Often. From me. Especially on ordinary days.
  • 07I promise that this is not seasonal. This is not a phase or a moment. This is me, fully in, for real, for keeps.
the real question 🕯️

One last
honest question.

"Will you keep choosing me — not just on anniversaries, but on the ordinary days too? On the quiet Tuesdays when there's no occasion, no reason, just us?"

Still here.
Still yours.

💛 on every ordinary day 💛

six months was just the beginning.

"I am my beloved's and my beloved is mine." — Song of Solomon 6:3

No anniversary needed. No occasion. Just me, thinking about you the way I always do, grateful that you exist in my life and grateful that you chose me too. That never gets ordinary. 🥹💛

Always, Trigxy 💛🕯️
